# AI Agent v1.0 - Core Implementation

**Due Date:** 2024-12-31  
**Description:** Initial AI agent implementation with basic calendar management capabilities

## Goals
- ✅ Implement core CRUD tools for calendar events
- ✅ Create availability tools for finding free time slots
- ✅ Build natural language processing for basic commands
- ✅ Integrate with Supabase database
- ✅ Add chat UI with streaming responses
- ✅ Implement family ID context handling

## Completed Features
- [x] Event creation, updating, and deletion
- [x] Free time slot detection
- [x] Natural language time parsing
- [x] Real-time chat interface
- [x] Error handling and validation
- [x] TypeScript type safety

## Success Criteria
- Users can schedule events using natural language
- Agent can find free time slots within specified windows
- Chat interface provides smooth user experience
- All operations are properly validated and error-handled
- Integration with existing family calendar system
